title: salvia verbenaca subsp. sabulicola
intro: Salvia verbenaca subsp. sabulicola, also known as sand savory, is a subspecies of the perennial herb Salvia verbenaca, native to Europe and western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of sand savory include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of sand savory include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and address various health concerns.
